profit_simulator.title: Smart Profit Simulator
profit_simulator.subtitle: Detailed financial analysis of new vs recovered orders with net interest calculation

profit_simulator.select_desc: To analyze real performance, choose one of your products to see statistics.
profit_simulator.fetch_failed: Failed to load data. Please try again.

profit_simulator.exchange_rate_desc: Dollar exchange rate against Algerian Dinar
profit_simulator.return_price_desc: Cost of losing each returned order (delivery fee + return fee)
profit_simulator.packaging_desc: Cost of packaging and preparing each confirmed order
profit_simulator.insurance_fee_desc: Percentage of product price deducted to insure delivered orders only
profit_simulator.other_additional_desc: Fixed additional amount added to total costs (e.g. salaries, rent...)
profit_simulator.recovered_profit_desc: Fully net profits, without ad budget. (Available in simulation mode only)
profit_simulator.cost_warning_desc: Ad cost calculated in this analysis is only for new orders (Ordinary), and doesn't include any ad budget for abandoned orders (Recovered) as we consider them net profits without extra acquisition cost.
